scripts.biome:check: biome lint apps/redirect-service/src packages/shared-db/client.ts packages/shared-db/schema.ts packages/shared-db/drizzle.config.ts
scripts.biome:format: biome format apps/redirect-service/src packages/shared-db/client.ts packages/shared-db/schema.ts packages/shared-db/drizzle.config.ts --write
scripts.check-all: bun run format && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
